text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While riding the bus to summer camp...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We really must make the most of camp this year
and refine my running. I hope to come away
having surpassed even Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. Well, I'm pleased to be correct. For a
moment there, I thought I might have said
something silly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's a relief... Wait, no. It's not. Our goal is so
clear that the lurking danger has come into view,
too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Silence Suzuka runs, she starts by leaping
ahead, then maintains that momentum all the way
to the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With no flaws whatsoever, she's the ultimate ideal
and embodies a perfection the likes of which
defies reason.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The only way we can possibly beat her is to find a
situation where we can outpace her overwhelming
speed. But when would we get that chance?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe we could make things work with a
long-distance race, but if it's medium-distance...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Knowing us, I'm quite sure we'll be fine. We've
overcome plenty of hurdles already, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her softly spoken words give me hope. It's a long
shot, but maybe... Just maybe...
choice_data_list: Can you envision how you're going to run?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suppose it was unrealistic to expect a practical
plan. That said, pessimism won't help either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This summer, there's really only one option
available to us...
choice_data_list: Why don't we see what they have to say?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our sights set on such a strong adversary, I
decide that our best bet will be to gather all the
wisdom we can from the Mejiro family over the
summer.
